title: Deco Art Americana Acrylic Multi-Purpose Paint, Lavender, 59 ml (Pack of 1)
features: Ideal for professional artists, crafters and students.
Range includes 100's of intermixable colours and special effect mediums.
Suitable for use on canvas, paper, wood, unglazed pottery & Styrofoam.
Ideal for making crafts, DIY handmade personalised, customised, gifts or presents.
description: Product Description DECOART Glamour Dust Ultra-Fine Glitter Paint.; A Non-toxic, water-based fine glitter coat for arts, crafts and home décor.; Adds sparkle and shimmer to almost any porous surface. ; Superior coverage, excellent adhesion and ideal colour palette.;Use over a similar colour background to enhance or intensify the shade.; Supplied in 2 fl.oz flip top lid bottles.; Conforms to ASTM D4236. Made in USA.; Visit www.DecoArt.com for further product information including video tutorials and a gallery for inspiration.; Follow DecoArt on Facebook, Twitter and Pinterest.; Box Contains 1 x 2 fl.oz (US) bottle of Glamour Dust / Glitter acrylic paint in the colour specified.
